hooks.command: echo '=== Rails Tests ===' && bin/rails test 2>&1 | tail -20 && echo '=== TypeScript ===' && npm run check 2>&1 | head -20

hooks.prompt:
Check ALL modified files (git diff --name-only) for these violations:
1. Controllers: missing `authorize`, `.as_json` usage, hardcoded flash messages without t()
2. React (.tsx): hardcoded visible text not wrapped in t(), <a href> instead of <Link>, fetch()/axios instead of router.*, hardcoded URL paths instead of routes.*, role checks instead of features.*
3. Missing i18n keys in any of the 3 languages (es, en, ru)
4. Imports of react-hook-form, zod, @tanstack/react-table, tiptap
Report each violation with file:line or say 'All checks passed.'
